name: Astrid Mid Century Dining Bench with Upholstered Seat Walnut - Threshold™
description:
Add extra seating to accommodate your guests or family members with this Astrid Mid-Century Dining Bench with Upholstered Seat from Threshold™. Set on a walnut wooden frame, this dining bench features ivory white upholstery for a modern look that goes great with your decor style and color palette. Easy to assemble with the tools provided, this upholstered dining bench helps you sit in comfort whether you're dining or just enjoying an evening chat together.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
